toolbar.back: Revenir dans l'historique du panneau actif.
toolbar.forward: Go forward in the active panel history.
toolbar.up: Open the parent folder of the active panel.
toolbar.swap: Swap left and right panel paths.
toolbar.terminal: Open a terminal in the active panel folder.
toolbar.theme: Switch between dark and light theme.
function.f2: Rename the selected file or folder.
function.f3: Preview the selected file with the best available preview handler.
function.f4: Edit the selected text/code file internally; binary files open externally.
function.f5: Copy the selected item from the active panel to the passive panel.
function.f6: Move the selected item from the active panel to the passive panel.
function.f7: Create a new folder in the active panel.
function.f8: Move the selected item into the application trash folder.
function.f9: Use the menu bar for less common commands.
pane.path: Enter or paste a folder path and press Enter to navigate.
pane.filter: Filter the visible entries in this panel. It does not search subfolders.
toolbar.locations: Choisir un lecteur, une racine, un point de montage ou un dossier courant pour le panneau actif.
pane.locations: Ouvre le sélecteur de lecteur/racine pour ce panneau.
